title: Spicy Brazilian Stir Fry
description: A spicy and flavorful stir fry dish inspired by Brazilian cuisine. Perfect for a quick and delicious meal.
instructions: 1. Cook fluffy rice according to package instructions.
2. In a separate pan, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium heat.
3. Add the brazilian spices and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
4. Add the fluffy chicken breast and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
5. Add the pitted dates and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
6. Stir in the spicy stir-fry sauce and cook for 1 minute, until the sauce is bubbly.
7. Serve the chicken and date mixture over the cooked fluffy rice.
8. Garnish with additional dates and brazilian spices, if desired.
